channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Offensive Flytipping, 21st March
item.description:
Silk Mills path on rear of block 1-54 Russett way Remove offensive flypostering from wall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Russett Way, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree roots cracking up tarmac on pavement, 21st March
item.description:
Tree roots cracking up tarmac on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Lancaster Avenue, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 50cm potholes, 21st March
item.description:
Many 50 cm potholes around speed humps

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Lancaster Avenue, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish pile amassing, 21st March
item.description:
Pile of rubbish appears to be growing each day for the last week. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Camberwell Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of traffic calming, 21st March
item.description:
As a cyclist lacking my way west out of Victoria park, I’ve consistently been close + fast passed by drivers on this stretch. the lack of both traffic calming measures + cycle infra is putting lives at risk.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van full of domestic waste, 21st March
item.description:
Vehicle has been towed and abandoned in Glenn’s Road and may contain hazardous materials.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenlea Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping by Woodford House, 21st March
item.description:
Household items dumped at entrance to Woodfield House

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rossington Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spilled rubbish Nelson Mandela House, 21st March
item.description:
Rubbish spilling from bins on the estate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London

item.description:
Dumped here

item.title: Food van, 21st March

Molesworth street by Lewisham Dlr Station Have yo Licensed this stall Tk dell Food on the Highway

item.title: Bus stop J The Clarendon Hotel towards Lee Green Or Lewisham : red roundel Id finial J is missing, 21st March
item.description:
Bus stop J The Clarendon Hotel towards Lee Green Or Lewisham : red roundel Id finial J is missing How DO these go missing? See photographs This shows when the J was still being displayed .... Https://www.instantstreetview.com/@51.46924,0.009134,161.78h,3.08p,3z,lOFlwQHwTXqUXzFafzLT8Q

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince Charles Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags dumped on the side of the path by the big tree, 21st March
item.description:
This appears to be happening multiple times a week.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookmill Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on bus time table, 21st March
item.description:
Molesworth Street bus stop p by the car park Has offensive graffiti on time table board. This would appear to be under the glass. Bus stop is not currently in use

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Molesworth Street, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: Bus shelter 0111 1005 at bus stop Eltham Park Gardens towards Kidbrooke : shelter light been out for 3 or more weeks now, 21st March
item.description:
Bus shelter 0111 1005 at bus stop Eltham Park Gardens towards Kidbrooke : shelter light been out for 3 or more weeks now See attached photographs Thank yiou

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92-96, Westmount Road, Well Hall, Greater London
